ch-001.title: The Morning Brief
ch-001.description: A calm, measured look at what happened overnight. Presenter maintains eye contact for the entire hour.

ch-001.title: Deep Read: Infrastructure
ch-001.description: A 45-minute investigation into a pothole on Route 7. Sources say it is 'definitely getting fixed soon.'

ch-001.title: Correspondent at Large
ch-001.description: Our roving reporter files from a location she describes as 'somewhere near the thing.'

ch-001.title: The Evening Context
ch-001.description: Everything you needed to know about today, provided three hours after you needed to know it.

ch-001.title: Off the Record
ch-001.description: Sources familiar with the matter speak extensively about something they'd prefer not to specify.

ch-001.title: Overnight: The Long Version
ch-001.description: Four hours of news. Not more news than usual — just slower.

ch-001.title: Weekend Wrap
ch-001.description: A summary of the week, delivered on the wrong day on purpose.

ch-001.title: Follow-Up Friday
ch-001.description: Remember that story from three weeks ago? We found out what happened. It is fine.

ch-002.title: BREAKING: Something Is Happening
ch-002.description: Details forthcoming. We have a graphic and a countdown clock. That is all for now.

ch-002.title: BREAKING: Still Happening
ch-002.description: Continued coverage of the thing. Panel of six experts agrees it is 'significant.'

ch-002.title: BREAKING: Update
ch-002.description: The situation has developed. One expert has revised their position from 'concerned' to 'very concerned.'

ch-002.title: BREAKING: Press Conference
ch-002.description: Live coverage of a press conference that starts in 40 minutes. We will be here.

ch-002.title: Analysis: Was That Breaking?
ch-002.description: A thoughtful debrief on the events of the morning. Spoiler: yes.

ch-002.title: BREAKING: New Development
ch-002.description: A new element has emerged. Analysts are calling it 'a lot.'

ch-002.title: Recap: Today's Breaking Events
ch-002.description: Everything that broke today, presented in reverse order of importance.

ch-002.title: BREAKING: Overnight Watch
ch-002.description: We're monitoring the situation. Nothing has happened yet. We will tell you if it does.

ch-003.title: The Weather, Probably
ch-003.description: A meteorologist makes educated guesses. More accurate than you'd expect, given the circumstances.

ch-003.title: Partly Cloudy, Mostly Opinion
ch-003.description: Extended forecast with strong editorial opinions about precipitation.

ch-003.title: Storm Watch: Precautionary
ch-003.description: No storm is currently present. We are watching anyway. Just to be safe.

ch-003.title: Radar Hour
ch-003.description: An hour of radar footage. No commentary. Viewers report finding it 'deeply soothing.'

ch-003.title: Weather Or Not: The Debate
ch-003.description: Two meteorologists disagree about clouds. Passions run surprisingly high.

ch-003.title: Humidity Report
ch-003.description: A detailed examination of how sticky it is, and why.

ch-003.title: Extended Forecast: Week 3
ch-003.description: We make predictions about weather that is 21 days away. Confidence level: medium.

ch-003.title: The Gentle Rain
ch-003.description: Live weather camera footage from a porch somewhere. It is raining gently. Nothing else is happening.

ch-004.title: The Opinion Zone
ch-004.description: Twelve pundits, one microphone, zero pauses. A viewer favorite.

ch-004.title: Counterpoint!
ch-004.description: You had a point. A guest has arrived to dispute it. The segment is 28 minutes long.

ch-004.title: Actually, Consider This
ch-004.description: A lone pundit reconsiders a position she stated four years ago. It goes well.

ch-004.title: The Pit: Prime Time
ch-004.description: Prime-time debate format. Topics chosen by spinning a wheel live on air.

ch-004.title: We Disagree: A Documentary
ch-004.description: Two people who disagree about something sit down and continue to disagree for an hour.

ch-004.title: Hot Take Cooldown
ch-004.description: Thirty minutes of room-temperature opinions. A palate cleanser.

ch-004.title: The Long Counterpoint
ch-004.description: One person rebuts something for 45 minutes without being interrupted. A first.

ch-004.title: Overnight: Pundit Overflow
ch-004.description: We ran out of topics. Pundits are now discussing the pundits.

ch-005.title: We Think This Is True
ch-005.description: A story we are 87% confident about. We will run it anyway and update as needed.

ch-005.title: Probable Update
ch-005.description: Further development on yesterday's story. Still mostly true. One detail has been revised.

ch-005.title: Confirmed: Something Happened
ch-005.description: We can now confirm the thing. Three days after it happened, but still.

ch-005.title: Sources Say (Probably)
ch-005.description: A source close to the situation has said something. We believe them conditionally.

ch-005.title: Clarification Hour
ch-005.description: We clarify yesterday's clarification. The original story remains unclear.

ch-005.title: Pending Verification
ch-005.description: We have a story but are still verifying it. Tune in to watch us try.

ch-005.title: The Correction
ch-005.description: We got something wrong. Here is a detailed account of how it happened.

ch-005.title: Overnight Best Guesses
ch-005.description: What we think happened while you were asleep. Confidence: medium-ish.

ch-006.title: Raw Data, No Context
ch-006.description: Numbers, presented without explanation. Viewers are encouraged to form their own conclusions.

ch-006.title: Statistics Hour
ch-006.description: Forty-five minutes of statistics. One of them is about you specifically.

ch-006.title: The Trend Report
ch-006.description: What is going up? What is going down? Why? We answer two of those questions.

ch-006.title: Numbers That Are Real
ch-006.description: We verify that the numbers we present are, in fact, real numbers.

ch-006.title: The Numbers at Night
ch-006.description: Evening data roundup. Markets, metrics, and one figure that economists call 'interesting.'

ch-006.title: Correlation Corner
ch-006.description: Things that move together, presented without any implication of causation whatsoever.

ch-006.title: Annual Numbers: The Update
ch-006.description: Year-to-date figures, updated daily, which makes the 'annual' part debatable.

ch-006.title: Overnight Data Watch
ch-006.description: Markets are closed. We watch the numbers anyway. None of them change. It is peaceful.

ch-007.title: International Shrug
ch-007.description: Global news delivered with the quiet resignation of someone who has seen things.

ch-007.title: Foreign Correspondent Fatigue
ch-007.description: Our correspondent has been on location for 11 days. She is doing fine. Mostly fine.

ch-007.title: Meanwhile, Elsewhere
ch-007.description: What is happening in other countries, while you were busy not thinking about them.

ch-007.title: Geopolitics: A Best-Effort Summary
ch-007.description: We try to explain it all in 90 minutes. We do not fully succeed. Nobody does.

ch-007.title: The State of Things
ch-007.description: A general assessment of the state of things, globally. Rating: mixed.

ch-007.title: From Over There
ch-007.description: Dispatches from places you don't immediately have a strong opinion about.

ch-007.title: Something Is Fine Somewhere
ch-007.description: Good news from around the world. The segment is 8 minutes long. We are trying.

ch-007.title: Overnight: The World Continues
ch-007.description: International overnight coverage. Events are occurring. We are watching.

ch-008.title: Technically, Yes
ch-008.description: News items that are, strictly speaking, accurate. The framing is where it gets interesting.

ch-008.title: The Qualifier Report
ch-008.description: Every statement comes with at least one qualifier. Often two.

ch-008.title: Nuance Hour
ch-008.description: A dedicated hour for nuance. Ratings are lower than they should be.

ch-008.title: It's Complicated
ch-008.description: Situations that cannot be summarized in a chyron. We try anyway.

ch-008.title: Fine Print
ch-008.description: The part of the story nobody reads. We read it for you.

ch-008.title: Technically Breaking
ch-008.description: It is technically a development. Whether it matters is a matter of perspective.

ch-008.title: Accurate But Misleading: A Case Study
ch-008.description: We examine statements that are true in the narrowest possible sense.

ch-008.title: Late Edition: Technically
ch-008.description: End-of-day summary. All facts double-checked. Footnotes available on request.

ch-009.title: Laugh Shift: Morning
ch-009.description: A comedy block that starts before most comedians are awake. Admirable commitment.

ch-009.title: Stand-Up or Sit Down
ch-009.description: Stand-up comedians perform. One of them remains seated the entire time. No one comments.

ch-009.title: The Bit That Went Long
ch-009.description: A sketch that was supposed to be three minutes and became thirty. Somehow works.

ch-009.title: Unscripted Afternoon
ch-009.description: Four comedians, no script, and a time slot that feels very long by minute forty.

ch-009.title: Laugh Factory: Greatest Misses
ch-009.description: Jokes that didn't land, presented without context. Educational.

ch-009.title: The Setup
ch-009.description: An hour of setups. Punchlines air tomorrow night. Build the anticipation.

ch-009.title: Late Night Adjacent
ch-009.description: It's not quite late enough for late night. We're doing it anyway.

ch-009.title: Overnight Reruns: The Classic Bits
ch-009.description: Comedy classics from the archive. At least three of these hold up.

ch-010.title: The Morning Groaner
ch-010.description: Dad jokes delivered at breakfast speed. Listeners report involuntary eye rolls within the first minute.

ch-010.title: Why Did the Chicken
ch-010.description: Classic format, new answers. Today's answers are worse than the original.

ch-010.title: Pun Run
ch-010.description: Forty-five straight minutes of puns, organized thematically. Today's theme: hardware stores.

ch-010.title: Dad Joke Championship
ch-010.description: Semi-finals. The competing jokes are all about lawnmowers. The audience is tense.

ch-010.title: Knock Knock: Expanded Edition
ch-010.description: The traditional format, extended to ninety minutes through audience participation.

ch-010.title: The Groaner of the Week
ch-010.description: One joke, examined in depth. Etymology, delivery analysis, family reactions.

ch-010.title: Late Night Dad Jokes
ch-010.description: The format does not change after dark. The delivery does, slightly.

ch-010.title: Dad Joke Overnight
ch-010.description: Jokes run on loop until morning. Viewers asleep by minute three. This is fine.

ch-011.title: The Pause
ch-011.description: Comedy built entirely around the pause before the punchline. No punchline ever arrives.

ch-011.title: Crickets: The Show
ch-011.description: Live comedy recordings, silence included. A lot of silence. More than expected.

ch-011.title: The Room Read
ch-011.description: A comedian attempts to read the room. The room is not readable. Ninety minutes.

ch-011.title: Too Soon?
ch-011.description: Comedy that questions timing. None of the jokes have landed yet. It is still too soon.

ch-011.title: The Long Silence
ch-011.description: A single comedian on stage, waiting. Something is about to happen. We think.

ch-011.title: Awkward Afternoons
ch-011.description: Sketch comedy that leans into social discomfort. Viewers are uncomfortable. As intended.

ch-011.title: Was That A Joke?
ch-011.description: We're not sure. The performer isn't sure. The audience is deciding.

ch-011.title: Late Night: The Pause Extended
ch-011.description: The format continues. The silence deepens. Sleep through it. You won't miss anything.

ch-012.title: Yes, And: Morning Edition
ch-012.description: Improv from 8am. The yes-and principle applies to everything, including the coffee.

ch-012.title: Scene Work
ch-012.description: Two improvisers, one vague suggestion from the audience, forty-five minutes.

ch-012.title: Genre Mash
ch-012.description: Improv performed in a genre voted on by text poll. Current leader: Western-noir-romance.

ch-012.title: The Harold
ch-012.description: A long-form improv structure performed in real time. If you know, you know.

ch-012.title: Suggestion Box
ch-012.description: Everything that happens tonight came from the audience. Including the format.

ch-012.title: Drop In
ch-012.description: Random guest performers join the scene with no warning. Nobody minds.

ch-012.title: Late Night Improv: Unconstrained
ch-012.description: Late enough that the rules of polite improv no longer fully apply.

ch-012.title: Warmup Block
ch-012.description: Improv warmup games broadcast live. More fun to watch than expected.

ch-013.title: The Cancellation Zone
ch-013.description: Classic sitcoms that were cancelled after one season, presented with love.

ch-013.title: Almost Made It: A Retrospective
ch-013.description: Shows that were one renewal away from a second season. Pour one out.

ch-013.title: Pilot Season: The Survivors
ch-013.description: Pilots that didn't get picked up, shown here because they deserved better.

ch-013.title: The Laugh Track Files
ch-013.description: Forgotten comedies from the laugh-track era. The laughs sound very confident.

ch-013.title: Too Weird for Prime Time
ch-013.description: Shows that were, in hindsight, ahead of their time. Or just weird.

ch-013.title: Season 2: The Ghost
ch-013.description: A tribute hour to the season 2 that never was. Writers share their unproduced ideas.

ch-013.title: Cult Following
ch-013.description: A show that failed commercially and succeeded culturally. Fifteen years later.

ch-013.title: Overnight: The Archive
ch-013.description: Eight hours of forgotten comedies from the archive. Find your new favorite show that no longer exists.

ch-014.title: Pun Intended: AM
ch-014.description: The morning block. All the wordplay you need to start your day wrong.

ch-014.title: Double Entendre Hour
ch-014.description: The title is self-explanatory. The content slightly less so.

ch-014.title: The Homophone Report
ch-014.description: Words that sound like other words, and the confusion that results.

ch-014.title: Wordplay Championship
ch-014.description: Competitive wordplay. Judges are linguists. Judging criteria are disputed.

ch-014.title: Pun Run: Afternoon
ch-014.description: An afternoon of puns. Different theme from the morning puns. Today: nautical terms.

ch-014.title: The Setup: Revisited
ch-014.description: We revisit yesterday's setups with better punchlines. No promises.

ch-014.title: Intended, With Commentary
ch-014.description: Puns, analyzed by a panel who clearly enjoy this more than they should.

ch-014.title: Overnight Wordplay
ch-014.description: Puns run on loop. You will dream in wordplay. This has been confirmed by viewers.

ch-015.title: Morning Sports Desk
ch-015.description: Last night's results, delivered by someone who watched all of them so you didn't have to.

ch-015.title: The Weekend Warriors
ch-015.description: Amateur athletes doing things professionally. One of them is very good.

ch-015.title: Court Time
ch-015.description: Live coverage of a match that probably matters. Commentary confirms it matters.

ch-015.title: Field Report
ch-015.description: From the field. Our reporter is there. The field is large. She will find what she's looking for.

ch-015.title: Game Day Analysis
ch-015.description: Four analysts break down a game from multiple angles. One angle is disputed.

ch-015.title: The Bench Perspective
ch-015.description: Sports coverage from the point of view of people who aren't playing today.

ch-015.title: Highlights: The Best Ones
ch-015.description: Only the best highlights. Duration varies depending on how good things were today.

ch-015.title: Late Night Sports Desk
ch-015.description: The late edition. Games are done. Analysis continues. It always continues.

ch-016.title: Preliminary Napping Heats
ch-016.description: Twelve competitors in the nap-off heats. Doris is looking strong this season.

ch-016.title: Advanced Napping Technique
ch-016.description: Documentary on professional technique. Position, environment, and duration strategy.

ch-016.title: The Competitive Nap: Semifinal
ch-016.description: Twelve become six. The panel assesses depth, consistency, and overall restfulness.

ch-016.title: Nap League: Post-Nap Analysis
ch-016.description: What just happened, and what it means for the standings.

ch-016.title: Nap or Sleep: The Boundary
ch-016.description: At what point does a nap become sleep? A technical discussion.

ch-016.title: Regional Qualifiers: Quiet Division
ch-016.description: The quiet division qualifiers. Coverage is appropriately hushed.

ch-016.title: The International Nap Federation Report
ch-016.description: Rule updates, rankings, and a profile of a competitor from Bruges who is very good at this.

ch-016.title: Overnight Coverage: Live Napping
ch-016.description: Eight hours of live competitive napping. Cameras remain on. Nothing happens. This is the point.

ch-017.title: Slow Motion Golf
ch-017.description: Golf, at half speed. New angles. Longer pauses. Somehow more exciting.

ch-017.title: Bowls: Extended Coverage
ch-017.description: Lawn bowls, unedited, from start to finish. Very long. Very calming.

ch-017.title: The Three-Hour Walk
ch-017.description: A competitive walking event, covered start to finish. Participants are in no hurry.

ch-017.title: Chess: Move Three
ch-017.description: We pick up a chess match at move three and cover it until the end. Very little happens until it does.

ch-017.title: Fishing: The Patient Sport
ch-017.description: Competitive fishing, shown in real time. The fish have not cooperated yet.

ch-017.title: Croquet: Semifinals
ch-017.description: Croquet semifinal coverage. Commentary is measured. Mallet usage is decisive.

ch-017.title: The Long Putt
ch-017.description: A documentary about one putt, from setup to completion. Forty-five minutes.

ch-017.title: Slow Sports Night
ch-017.description: An overnight block of the slowest sports available. Sleep encouraged.

ch-018.title: The Couch Report
ch-018.description: Sports analysis from a very comfortable couch. Analysts have not moved since Tuesday.

ch-018.title: Fantasy League Breakdown
ch-018.description: A deep dive into fantasy leagues that have real emotional stakes for everyone involved.

ch-018.title: The Watch Party
ch-018.description: We watch a game. So do you. We discuss it while it happens. This is a sports show.

ch-018.title: Remote Control Athletics
ch-018.description: Competitive video game sports. Players are very athletic in their chair.

ch-018.title: Armchair Punditry: PM
ch-018.description: Evening analysis from the comfort of leather seating. Opinions are confident.

ch-018.title: The Rewatch
ch-018.description: We watch yesterday's game again. Analysts note what they missed the first time.

ch-018.title: Prediction Corner
ch-018.description: Predictions about tomorrow's events. Success rate: tracking at 54%.

ch-018.title: Overnight: The Replay Lounge
ch-018.description: Classic games on a loop. Commentary optional. Couch required.

ch-019.title: The Sport That Definitely Exists
ch-019.description: Live coverage of a sport. It is real. Rules will be explained in minute twelve.

ch-019.title: Extreme Qualifying Round
ch-019.description: Before the main event, there are qualifiers. Before the qualifiers, there is this show.

ch-019.title: Definitely Real Highlights
ch-019.description: Highlights from today's definitely-real sports events. All verified. Mostly.

ch-019.title: The Championship: Probably
ch-019.description: This might be the championship. Rules are still being discussed. Bracket pending.

ch-019.title: Post-Game with No Agenda
ch-019.description: Post-game analysis with no prior commitments about what we will say.

ch-019.title: Sports, Broadly Defined
ch-019.description: A wide interpretation of what constitutes a sport. Very wide.

ch-019.title: Results: Best Efforts
ch-019.description: Scores and results. Some of these are confirmed. All are presented confidently.

ch-019.title: Overnight: Real Sports Happening
ch-019.description: International coverage. Somewhere, right now, something sporty is occurring.

ch-020.title: Deep Dive: Episode 1
ch-020.description: A thorough examination of a single topic. Today: the history of the semicolon.

ch-020.title: The 90-Minute Essay
ch-020.description: One filmmaker. One topic. Ninety minutes of careful, considered argument.

ch-020.title: Field Work
ch-020.description: Documentary footage from the field. The field is a salt flat in Nevada. It is very flat.

ch-020.title: Under Examination
ch-020.description: A subject is examined. The examination is thorough. A conclusion is reached in the final minutes.

ch-020.title: The Long Form
ch-020.description: Long-form documentary storytelling. No narrator. The footage speaks.

ch-020.title: Follow-Up: Two Years Later
ch-020.description: A documentary revisiting a subject from two years ago. Things are complicated now.

ch-020.title: Archival
ch-020.description: Footage from the archive with modern context applied. Perspective shifts accordingly.

ch-020.title: Overnight: The Long Cuts
ch-020.description: Extended cuts of documentary features, uninterrupted, through the night.

ch-021.title: Someone Is Lying
ch-021.description: We don't know who yet. The first forty minutes are eliminating suspects.

ch-021.title: The Long Pause Before the Reveal
ch-021.description: Everything has been building to this. The pause lasts seventeen minutes. Then the reveal.

ch-021.title: Family Dinner: Extended
ch-021.description: A tense family dinner that begins at 6pm and ends somewhere unpleasant.

ch-021.title: The Return
ch-021.description: Someone has returned. No one is pleased about it, least of all the person who returned.

ch-021.title: The Email That Started Everything
ch-021.description: A drama in which the inciting incident is an email. The read receipts are crucial.

ch-021.title: Two People in a Room
ch-021.description: A room. Two people. Neither of them is entirely honest. Ninety minutes.

ch-021.title: Tension: The Late Edition
ch-021.description: Evening drama. Stakes have been raised. Someone is about to do something they cannot undo.

ch-021.title: Overnight Thrills
ch-021.description: Drama continues into the night. Resolution is not guaranteed before dawn.

ch-022.title: The Brooding Hour: Morning
ch-022.description: Drama that begins at dawn. The protagonist watches the sunrise and makes a decision.

ch-022.title: Rain Window
ch-022.description: A character stands at a window in the rain for forty-five minutes. Then acts on it.

ch-022.title: The Weight of Things
ch-022.description: A quiet drama about small decisions and their disproportionate consequences.

ch-022.title: Unspoken
ch-022.description: Ninety minutes of subtext. Text is minimal. The subtext carries everything.

ch-022.title: The Letter
ch-022.description: Someone wrote a letter. It has not been sent. The decision about whether to send it takes an hour.

ch-022.title: Aftermath
ch-022.description: A drama set entirely in the aftermath of something we did not witness.

ch-022.title: Late Night Brooding
ch-022.description: The protagonist has been thinking all day. They are still thinking. The audience thinks along.

ch-022.title: Overnight: In The Dark
ch-022.description: Drama that takes place, literally and figuratively, in the dark.

ch-023.title: Crisis: Hour One
ch-023.description: The situation is developing. No one is calm. The music is helping no one calm down.

ch-023.title: Crisis: Escalation
ch-023.description: It has gotten worse. This was expected. The expectation did not help.

ch-023.title: The Task Force
ch-023.description: A task force is assembled. Six people with different skill sets, questionable availability.

ch-023.title: Containment
ch-023.description: The effort to contain the situation. The situation has opinions about this.

ch-023.title: 72 Hours
ch-023.description: A drama set across 72 hours. Shown in a compressed 90-minute format. Tension is maintained.

ch-023.title: The Room Where It Happened
ch-023.description: We stay in one room for forty-five minutes. Everything comes to that room.

ch-023.title: Crisis: Resolution (Provisional)
ch-023.description: The crisis resolves. Provisionally. A sequel is implied.

ch-023.title: Overnight Emergency
ch-023.description: The crisis continues into the night. Emergency programming. Sort of.

ch-024.title: Nobody Planned This
ch-024.description: A competition where the format changes every episode based on a vote. Last week's vote was a mistake.

ch-024.title: Confessional: Early Edition
ch-024.description: Contestants explain their choices to a camera. The camera is non-judgmental. The audience is not.

ch-024.title: The Alliance: Dissolved
ch-024.description: An alliance from last episode has collapsed. Six people are now pretending nothing happened.

ch-024.title: Vote: The Deliberation
ch-024.description: Ninety minutes of deliberation before the vote. The outcome is already inevitable.

ch-024.title: Reunion: Unresolved
ch-024.description: A reunion special where not everything gets resolved. Several things get worse.

ch-024.title: Unscripted Drama
ch-024.description: Something unscripted is happening that none of us planned for. We're rolling with it.

ch-024.title: Late Night: Post-Vote
ch-024.description: Analysis of the vote. Two cast members are not speaking to each other for separate reasons.

ch-024.title: Overnight: The Watch Party
ch-024.description: Watch along coverage. Comments stream live. Many of them are about the hair.

ch-025.title: Mise en Place: A Disaster
ch-025.description: Organized preparation followed by organized chaos. One contestant has confused salt with sugar. Again.

ch-025.title: The Knife Skills Test
ch-025.description: Contestants are assessed on knife skills. The assessment takes forty-five minutes. The cutting takes five.

ch-025.title: The Mystery Basket: Season 4
ch-025.description: A basket containing blue cheese, kombucha, parsnips, and candy corn. Good luck.

ch-025.title: Plating Under Pressure
ch-025.description: Twelve seconds remaining. Beautiful food. Somehow the plates are wrong.

ch-025.title: The Elimination: Extended
ch-025.description: The elimination has been extended to ninety minutes due to unprecedented flavor disagreements.

ch-025.title: Judge's Table: Uncut
ch-025.description: The full judge's deliberation, unedited. They discuss one dish for twenty-two minutes.

ch-025.title: Chaos Kitchen: Late Night Special
ch-025.description: Post-competition cooking, no rules, no timer. Total freedom. Somehow worse.

ch-025.title: Overnight: The Recipes
ch-025.description: The recipes contestants couldn't cook in time, prepared correctly by someone else.

ch-026.title: The Confessional: Morning Block
ch-026.description: Contestants confess things to a camera at 8am. The stakes are unclear. The vulnerability is real.

ch-026.title: I Regret The Following
ch-026.description: A structured format for contestants to address regrettable decisions from last episode.

ch-026.title: The Overshare
ch-026.description: Someone says too much. Another person reacts. Sixty minutes of cascading consequences.

ch-026.title: Off Camera: A Special
ch-026.description: What contestants said when they thought cameras were off. They were not off.

ch-026.title: The Apology
ch-026.description: Someone apologizes. The apology takes ninety minutes, including the setup.

ch-026.title: Secrets: Part Two
ch-026.description: Part one aired last week. We don't repeat it here. You'll figure it out.

ch-026.title: Late Night: Unfiltered
ch-026.description: Late-night edition. The filter is off. Contestants say what they mean. Mostly.

ch-026.title: Overnight Confessionals
ch-026.description: Eight hours of archival confessional footage. Someone is definitely still upset about this.

ch-027.title: Who Did That: Morning Edition
ch-027.description: Something happened overnight in the shared house. Nobody is admitting anything. Investigation begins.

ch-027.title: Forensic Roommates
ch-027.description: We apply investigative methodology to a missing snack situation. The methodology is thorough.

ch-027.title: The Lineup
ch-027.description: Four suspects. One incident. Each one has a story. At least one story is implausible.

ch-027.title: It Was Probably Derek
ch-027.description: It might not be Derek. Ninety minutes of evidence before we decide.

ch-027.title: The Reveal
ch-027.description: We found out who did that. We're not telling you for twenty minutes. Then we do.

ch-027.title: Next Week's Setup
ch-027.description: Something else happened. Who did that? We'll find out next episode.

ch-027.title: Late Night: The Debrief
ch-027.description: Post-reveal debrief. Derek has thoughts. Derek always has thoughts.

ch-027.title: Overnight: Unsolved
ch-027.description: Three incidents that remain unresolved. The investigation continues.

ch-028.title: The Full Picture
ch-028.description: An hour-long documentary that attempts to show the full picture. The picture is very large.

ch-028.title: Why, Though
ch-028.description: A documentary series asking why things are the way they are. Several whys are answered.

ch-028.title: The Explainer: Extended
ch-028.description: We explain a concept in full. The full explanation takes ninety minutes. Bring snacks.

ch-028.title: Origin Story
ch-028.description: Where did this come from? A documentary history, starting much earlier than you expected.

ch-028.title: Context
ch-028.description: Thirty minutes of pure context, with no story attached. Just context.

ch-028.title: The B-Roll Files
ch-028.description: Documentary footage that didn't make the final cut of other documentaries. Excellent B-roll.

ch-028.title: Long Read: Visual
ch-028.description: A long-form essay, told visually. No host. No interviews. Just the thing itself.

ch-028.title: Overnight: The Deep Catalogue
ch-028.description: Full documentary features from the archive, back to back, through the night.

ch-029.title: Wiggly Things: Morning
ch-029.description: Animated creatures wiggle for thirty minutes. What are they? Nobody knows. They are having a great time.

ch-029.title: The Shape Song
ch-029.description: Every shape gets a song. The hexagon's song goes on for eleven minutes. It earned it.

ch-029.title: Numbers Are Fun (Part 7)
ch-029.description: Part seven of the ongoing numbers series. Seven features prominently.

ch-029.title: Let's Find the Thing
ch-029.description: A group of animated friends looks for a thing. They find it in the final two minutes.

ch-029.title: Feelings: A Show
ch-029.description: Characters explore feelings. Every feeling is valid. The show is thirty minutes of validation.

ch-029.title: More Wiggly Things
ch-029.description: Additional wiggly things have arrived. The situation is delightful.

ch-029.title: Colors, Again
ch-029.description: A review of colors for those who may have forgotten. Very thorough. Very colorful.

ch-029.title: Bedtime Block
ch-029.description: Calmer content for the evening. The wiggly things have settled. It is almost bedtime.

ch-030.title: Saturday Morning (Any Day)
ch-030.description: The classic Saturday morning cartoon block, available seven days a week. No notes.

ch-030.title: Found in the Archive
ch-030.description: Cartoons from the archive that haven't aired in a long time. They hold up. Mostly.

ch-030.title: The Obscure Ones
ch-030.description: Cartoons that ran for one season between 1991 and 2003. Someone loved them.

ch-030.title: Cartoon Analysis
ch-030.description: An academic analysis of a cartoon. Aimed at children. Enjoyed more by adults.

ch-030.title: The Long Episode
ch-030.description: A cartoon episode that is much longer than a normal cartoon episode. Quality maintained throughout.

ch-030.title: Fan Favorites: Voted On
ch-030.description: Episodes voted in by viewers. Third place is a controversial choice. Fourth place is correct.

ch-030.title: New Stuff
ch-030.description: Recent cartoons, assessed on whether they capture the spirit of the old stuff. Mixed results.

ch-030.title: Overnight Archive Block
ch-030.description: Cartoons from the archive, overnight. Nostalgia runs uninterrupted until dawn.

ch-031.title: Good Morning, Small Humans
ch-031.description: A show that welcomes children to the day gently. The host has had a lot of coffee.

ch-031.title: The Quiet Activity Block
ch-031.description: Low-stimulation content for children who need a break. Very slow. Very soft.

ch-031.title: Story Time: Extended
ch-031.description: A story. Then another story. Then a third story. The third one is the best.

ch-031.title: Nap Preparation Programming
ch-031.description: Content specifically designed to prepare children for napping. Success rate: 73%.

ch-031.title: Afternoon Quiet
ch-031.description: A calm afternoon block. The music is gentle. The pacing is intentional.

ch-031.title: The Sleepy Animal Show
ch-031.description: Animals that are tired. Footage of sleepy animals doing things slowly.

ch-031.title: Evening Wind Down
ch-031.description: Transitional content between afternoon energy and bedtime. The host whispers.

ch-031.title: Overnight Lullabies
ch-031.description: Four hours of lullaby content. For children. Equally effective on adults.

ch-032.title: The Morning Hobby
ch-032.description: Thirty minutes with someone who is very good at a hobby and willing to explain it.

ch-032.title: Container Gardening: Advanced
ch-032.description: We've covered the basics. This is the advanced session. Soil composition is discussed at length.

ch-032.title: The Slow Craft
ch-032.description: A craft that takes time. Shown in full. No time-lapse. All of the time.

ch-032.title: Gentle Renovation
ch-032.description: Home improvement without drama. Things go as planned. The hosts are calm throughout.

ch-032.title: The Hobby Block
ch-032.description: Three hobbies, thirty minutes each. Today: fermentation, miniature painting, and knots.

ch-032.title: Good Enough Is Good
ch-032.description: A show that celebrates competent but imperfect work. The results are charming.

ch-032.title: Seasonal Craft
ch-032.description: A craft appropriate to the season. We argue about which season it currently is.

ch-032.title: Evening Projects
ch-032.description: Projects to start in the evening, intending to finish over the weekend. Realistic scope.
